activities_projects.title: Constructing Tangents from External Point
activities_projects.objective: Draw tangents from a point outside the circle and verify equal lengths
steps: Draw a circle with center O
Mark an external point P
Construct two tangents from P to the circle
Measure the lengths of both tangents and verify they are equal
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands tangent properties and equal tangents theorem
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate construction, measurement, and verification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Cyclic Quadrilateral Proof
activities_projects.objective: Verify that opposite angles of a cyclic quadrilateral sum to 180°
steps: Draw a cyclic quadrilateral ABCD inside a circle
Measure opposite angles (∠A + ∠C, ∠B + ∠D)
Verify the sum of each pair is 180°
Record observations

activities_projects.title: Angle Subtended by Chord at Center and Circumference
steps: Draw a circle with chord AB
Draw radii OA and OB
Measure angle at center (∠AOB) and angle at circumference (∠ACB) subtended by the same chord
Verify ∠AOB = 2 × ∠ACB

activities_projects.title: Constructing Circle with Given Chord and Angle
activities_projects.objective: Construct a circle passing through a chord forming a given angle at circumference
steps: Draw a chord AB of given length
Use protractor to mark the given angle at circumference
Locate the center using perpendicular bisector of chord
Draw circle passing through endpoints of chord
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies circle construction with chord-angle property

activities_projects.title: Tangent Perpendicularity Proof
activities_projects.objective: Prove that a tangent is perpendicular to the radius at the point of contact
steps: Draw a circle with center O
Draw a tangent at point P on the circle
Draw radius OP
Measure the angle between tangent and radius and verify it is 90°
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate construction and proof verification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Angle in Semicircle Verification
activities_projects.objective: Verify that angle subtended by diameter is a right angle
steps: Draw a circle with diameter AB
Choose a point C on circumference not on diameter
Draw triangle ABC
Measure ∠ACB to verify it is 90°
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands right angle property of semicircle

activities_projects.title: Constructing Concentric Circles and Annulus
activities_projects.objective: Construct two concentric circles and measure ring area
steps: Draw two circles with same center O but different radii
Shade the ring (annulus) between the circles
Measure radii and calculate area of the annulus
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies concentric circle concepts and area calculation

activities_projects.title: Observing Tangents and Circle Shapes in Real Life
activities_projects.objective: Identify and analyze tangents in real-life circular objects
steps: Look for circular objects like clock, wheel, lid, or manhole
Identify tangent points and draw approximate tangents
Label center, radius, and tangents
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects circle and tangent concepts to real life

activities_projects.title: Cyclic Quadrilateral Real-Life Example
activities_projects.objective: Observe cyclic quadrilaterals in real life and verify properties
steps: Identify a cyclic quadrilateral structure (e.g., window, clock frame, decoration)
Draw it to scale in notebook
Measure opposite angles to verify sum = 180°
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies cyclic quadrilateral properties in real world
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate drawing, measurement, and verification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Project: Designing Circular Garden Layout
activities_projects.objective: Apply circle properties, tangents, and sectors in a practical project
steps: Design a circular garden layout with pathways and sections
Use tangents and radius to mark paths and boundaries
Shade sectors and segments for flower beds
Label center, radius, tangents, and sectors
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Integrates circle properties into real-life design project
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy, clarity, and application of circle concepts (10 marks)
